title: JSON API Endpoint
description: Build a simple API that returns JSON data.
problemStatement:
Create an HTTP server on port 3000 that responds to `GET /api/users` with a JSON array of user objects. Each user object should have `id` and `name` properties. For example:
```json
[
  { "id": 1, "name": "Alice" },
  { "id": 2, "name": "Bob" }
]
```
Also, handle `GET /api/users/:id` (where `:id` is a number) and return the single user object with that id, or 404 if not found. For simplicity, you can hardcode a small array of users.

Set the correct `Content-Type` header.
hints: Parse the URL to get the path and possible id. Use `req.url` and maybe split the string.
For the parameter, you can check if the URL starts with '/api/users/' and extract the part after.
Use `JSON.stringify()` to convert the object to a string.
expectedOutput: JSON array or single object, with 404 for invalid id.
